title: Asunción Sky Residences
shortDescription: Modern two and three-bedroom apartments in central Asunción with premium amenities, rooftop pool, and city views.
longDescription: Modern two and three-bedroom apartments in central Asunción with premium amenities, rooftop pool, co-working lounge, and secure parking.

title: Luque Garden Villas
shortDescription: Gated community of contemporary townhouses close to the airport, with green spaces and family-friendly facilities.
longDescription: Contemporary townhouses in a gated community near Asunción airport. Landscaped gardens, playgrounds, and clubhouse designed for families and long-stay living.

title: Costa Blanca Seaview
shortDescription: Mediterranean-style new build apartments on Spain's Costa Blanca with sea views, pool, and strong rental potential.
longDescription: Mediterranean-style apartments on Spain's Costa Blanca offering sea views, infinity pool, spa, and strong short- and long-term rental potential.
